s0050u0002.assistant_reply: Many people regard Neptune Oyster as having the best lobster roll in Boston. However, some other popular options for lobster rolls include Row 34, James Hook & Co., and B&G Oysters. It would be best to try a few and see which one suits your taste preferences the best!

s0050u0004.assistant_reply:
James Hook & Co. offers sides such as coleslaw, clam chowder, and potato salad which you can add to your order. As for drinks, they offer soda and bottled water. There's no information on whether they serve alcoholic beverages or not.

Regarding reservations, James Hook & Co. is a takeout spot, and it doesn't require a reservation. You can just walk in and place your order for a lobster roll.

s0050u0005.assistant_reply: James Hook & Co. is a takeout spot, and they don't provide any indoor or outdoor seating areas for their customers. So, if you want to enjoy your lobster roll at James Hook & Co., you will have to eat it on their nearby benches or find a spot in the surrounding park or waterfront area. However, if you're worried about crowds or prefer a more comfortable seating area, you can take your lobster roll to go and eat it somewhere else. Boston has several parks and picnic areas, such as Boston Common or the Esplanade, where you could enjoy your lobster roll.

s0050u0006.assistant_reply: You're welcome! I hope you enjoy your visit to James Hook & Co., and your lobster roll is absolutely delicious. If you need any further assistance or have any more questions, don't hesitate to ask.
